title: JM's Copper Powered Rails Resourcepack Version
description: This resourcepack changes the appearance of powered rails to look as if they are made with copper instead of gold
body:
With coppers ties to redstone I thought it would make more sense if powered rails were made of copper in place of gold. So I made this pack.

This recoursepack is compatable with my other pack [JM's Fixes](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/jms-fixes)
